Blechum angustifolium is further classified as Blechum angustifolium (Kunth) Lindau, with the specific name derived from its narrow leaf shape. The plant is a herbaceous perennial, characterized by its small white flowers and narrow leaves. Blechum angustifolium is native to tropical regions of Central and South America.
